name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: has_suggestions must be a boolean per §2.1; non-boolean values are rejected
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-305
type: problem
has_suggestions: maybe
' > g-ts-305.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-305.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'has_suggestions: must be boolean' err.txt && echo bool_enforced 1>&2
